options.content:
# Juddges — API Health — not yet wired up

**Blocked:** No Prometheus/OpenTelemetry instrumentation exists in the FastAPI app yet (no /metrics endpoint).

### Intended tiles
- Request rate by route (5m)
- Latency p50 / p95 / p99
- 4xx / 5xx rate by route
- Error-budget burn (once an SLO is defined)

### What it needs
Add a Prometheus exporter (e.g. prometheus-fastapi-instrumentator) + a Prometheus datasource, OR log request metrics to a Postgres table this dashboard can query. Track under a follow-up to #196.

_This placeholder is committed so the dashboard set is complete and reviewable; it renders cleanly (text only) and carries no panels that would error against a datasource that does not exist yet._
